MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-03-2005 Continued To Jan-17-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; Separate Statement
Off Calendar Sep-15-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Defendant Plant Construction Company's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories and Request For Production of Documents is granted in part and denied in part.
The motion is denied as it seeks further responses to Interrogatory Nos. 9, 13, and 15. The interrogatories seek the identification of documents, and the response provides that identification. The motion is granted as to No. 12. As the response may be that there are no responsive documents, that verified response must be given.
The motion is granted as to Document Request Nos. 25 and 27 as Defendant is ordered to provide a verification within 15 days of notice of this order that all responsive documents have been produced. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
